hero: Providing investors with access to Real Assets with Real Returns.
heroSub: A real estate focused fund manager delivering investment opportunities that generate exceptional risk adjusted returns from developments that contribute to thriving communities.
aboutSub: Elite Capital is a Dubai International Financial Centre (DIFC) based, DFSA-authorised private equity firm, combining in-depth local knowledge with strategic global fund management expertise to offer international investors with access to attractive real estate investment opportunities. Our success is built on creating long-lasting partnerships with our investors.

stats.text: Real estate projects exclusive to Elite Capital
Equity required for Elite Capital's exclusive pipeline

values.valueContent: We strive to be the partner of choice for investors, developers and communities, building strong relationships that deliver long-term solutions and success.
We are committed to the highest standards of honesty, accountability and ethics.

We combine deep local knowledge with global investment expertise to ensure our investment strategies are innovative, data-driven and reliable. Our team consistently delivers a best-in-class approach to seeking superior risk adjusted returns.
We build and maintain trust by promoting transparent collaboration in our dealings and prioritizing the interests of our stakeholders.
We invest in responsibly designed developments to deliver lasting environmental and social benefits to communities.

advantage.text: Canada stands out as an attractive G7 investment destination due to its stable economy, abundance of natural resources, top-tier sovereign credit rating (Aaa/AAA from Moody's and S&P), and strong long-term fundamentals.Canada's population is projected to grow substantially in the coming decades, reaching between 50 and 60 million by 2050 under Statistics Canada's medium-growth scenario (2026), driving sustained long-term demand across key sectors - particularly housing.

Canada's residential real estate market is underpinned by persistent structural demand that continues to outpace supply by a significant margin. According to the Canada Mortgage and Housing Corporation (CMHC), Canada faces a housing supply gap of approximately 2.3 million homes by 2035 - one of the most acute affordability challenges in the G7 - creating a durable, long-term investment opportunity in purpose-built residential development.

diversifyHead: Diversify your portfolio with attractive Canadian real estate

diversify.text: Elite Capital investors will gain access to a curated and exclusive pipeline of over 45 community-focused developments across Ontario, Canada. The pipeline includes several shovel ready purpose-built development projects, each having undergone an extensive pre-development and permitting process.
This exclusive pipeline, combined with our rigorous due-diligence process and hands-on asset management, is geared to deliver strong, risk adjusted returns to our investors.

portfolioHead: Our select pipeline of investment opportunities
portfolioSub: Browse through our diversified portfolio of purpose-built residential developments in Ontario
contactSub: Contact us to learn more about our investment opportunities.
